rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portuguese daily life; Iran deal uncertainty has minor indirect energy price relevance but remains unresolved continuation.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: A confirmed Iran deal could modestly ease European energy prices, offering slight relief to Portuguese households, but the deal remains unconfirmed.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A major UK-Japan trade and investment deal signals shifting global economic alliances; minimal direct impact on Portugal but reflects broader EU trade environment.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns injuring 17 at Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in nearby Spain (Cártama, Málaga) is geographically close and touches the Iberian tourism sector relevant to Portugal's economy.
